name: ebenova-fieldops
description: WhatsApp-native field service booking, staff coordination, and revenue recovery. Book jobs, assign staff, send payment links, and recover unpaid invoices via AI agent.

tools.name: create_booking
tools.description: Create a new field service booking with auto staff assignment

tools.name: get_booking
tools.description: Get booking details and current status

tools.name: check_availability
tools.description: Check available slots for a given date

tools.name: list_services
tools.description: List all available services and pricing

tools.name: list_staff
tools.description: List staff members and their availability

tools.name: send_staff_briefing
tools.description: Send a WhatsApp job briefing to assigned staff

tools.name: get_unpaid_invoices
tools.description: Get list of unpaid invoices for follow-up

tools.name: recover_invoice
tools.description: Send WhatsApp payment recovery sequence to a customer
